description: Composition:100% cotton yellow shirt for boysWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs..Fitting:Comfort FitThis happy yellow shirt from disney is perfect for toddlers in summer. Pooh and Tigger will keep him company when he is outside romping about with his little buddies.
